description.p: Your technique allows you to form your hair into a variety of shapes.

sheet.description: Your technique allows you to form your hair into a variety of shapes.

description.p: Beginning at 1st level, you have learned to move your hair into different forms using cursed energy. When you take the Attack action, you can spend 1 CE to replace an attack by shaping your hair into a barbed stinger. Make a melee cursed energy attack against a creature within 10 ft of you. On a hit you deal 1d10 + your CE modifier piercing damage. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with this attack at 3rd level. This increases to a +2 bonus at 6th level, +3 bonus at 11th level and +4 bonus at 18th level.

sheet.description: When you take the Attack action, you can spend 1 CE to replace an attack by shaping your hair into a barbed stinger. Make a melee CE attack against a creature within 10 ft of you. On a hit you deal 1d10 + {{hair:manipulation:scorpion:hair:damage}} piercing damage.

When you take the Attack action, you can spend 1 CE to replace an attack by shaping your hair into a barbed stinger. Make a melee CE attack with a +{{hair:manipulation:scorpion:hair:bonus}} to hit against a creature within 10 ft of you. On a hit you deal 1d10 + {{hair:manipulation:scorpion:hair:damage}} piercing damage.

description.p: At 3rd level, you have learned to form your hair into drill bits and shoot them off as projectiles. When you take the Attack action, you can spend 1 cursed energy to replace an attack with a ranged cursed energy attack roll with a range of 30ft. This attack deals 1d6 + your CE modifier piercing damage. The range of this technique increases to 60 ft at 6th level.

When attacking with a drill, you can spend an additional 2 cursed energy to make the drill explode in a 5 ft radius upon the point of impact causing creatures in range to make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, they take an additional 3d6 fire damage. On a success, they take half as much damage. The fire damage increases to 5d6 at 6th level, 8d6 at 11th level and 10d6 at 18th level.

sheet.description: When you take the Attack action, you can spend 1 CE to replace an attack with a ranged CE attack roll with a range of {{hair:manipulation:drill:hair:distance}}ft. This attack deals 1d6 + {{ce:modifier}} piercing damage. You can spend an additional 2 CE to make the drill explode in a 5 ft radius upon the point of impact causing creatures in range to make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, they take an additional {{hair:manipulation:drill:hair:damage}}d6 fire damage. On a success, they take half as much damage.

description.p: At 6th level you have learned to make more complex constructs from your hair. As an action for 3 CE, you form your hair into either a Jet or Helicopter for 1 minute and can spend 1 CE to keep the form active for 1 minute:

Helicopter Hair. You gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed and can take the Dash action as a bonus action. When you take the attack action, you can spend 2 cursed energy to replace one attack by extending your blades and attempting to slash an enemy. Make a melee cursed energy attack, on a hit you deal 6d8 + your CE modifier slashing damage. This damage increases to 8d8 at 11th level, and 10d8 at 18th level.
A creature that hits you with an Opportunity attack takes slashing damage equal to your CE modifier. This becomes twice your CE modifier at 11th level.

Jet Hair. You gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed. When you take the dash action while flying, you not only do not provoke opportunity attacks, but can also choose to move in a straight line and crash through creatures. All creatures in your path must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take Xd8 bludgeoning damage and are pushed back 30 ft away from you and knocked prone. If they impact a solid surface, they take 1d4 bludgeoning for every 10 ft you traveled in a straight line before crashing into them. On a successful save they take half as much damage and are not pushed or knocked prone. (X = CE modifier)
At 11th level, taking the Dash action while flying you instead move up to twice your flying speed. This increases to three times your flying speed at 18th level.

sheet.description: For 3 CE, form your hair into either a Jet or Helicopter for 1 minute and you can spend 1 CE to keep the form active for a additional minute.

description.p: You gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed and can take the Dash action as a bonus action. When you take the attack action, you can spend 2 cursed energy to replace one attack by extending your blades and attempting to slash an enemy. Make a melee cursed energy attack, on a hit you deal 6d8 + your CE modifier slashing damage. This damage increases to 8d8 at 11th level, and 10d8 at 18th level.
A creature that hits you with an Opportunity attack takes slashing damage equal to your CE modifier. This becomes twice your CE modifier at 11th level.

sheet.description: You gain a {{speed}} ft. flying speed and can take the Dash action as a bonus action. When you take the attack action, you can spend 2 CE to replace one attack with a melee CE attack. On a hit you deal {{hair:manipulation:helicopter:hair:damage}}d8 + {{ce:modifier}} slashing damage. A creature that hits you with an opportunity attack takes {{hair:manipulation:helicopter:hair:opportunity}} slashing damage.

description.p: You gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed. When you take the dash action while flying, you not only do not provoke opportunity attacks, but can also choose to move in a straight line and crash through creatures. All creatures in your path must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take Xd8 bludgeoning damage and are pushed back 30 ft away from you and knocked prone. If they impact a solid surface, they take 1d4 bludgeoning for every 10 ft you traveled in a straight line before crashing into them. On a successful save they take half as much damage and are not pushed or knocked prone. (X = CE modifier)
At 11th level, taking the Dash action while flying you instead move up to twice your flying speed. This increases to three times your flying speed at 18th level.

sheet.description: You gain a {{speed}} ft. flying speed. When you take the dash action while flying you do not provoke opportunity attacks and can move in a straight line to crash through creatures. All creatures in your path must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take {{ce:modifier}}d8 bludgeoning damage and are pushed back 30 ft away from you and knocked prone. If they impact a solid surface, they take 1d4 bludgeoning for every 10 ft you traveled in a straight line before crashing into them. On a successful save they take half as much damage and are not pushed or knocked prone.

You gain a {{speed}} ft. flying speed. When you take the dash action you can move a extra two times your flying speed instead of one. of while flying you do not provoke opportunity attacks and can move in a straight line to crash through creatures. All creatures in your path must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take {{ce:modifier}}d8 bludgeoning damage and are pushed back 30 ft away from you and knocked prone. If they impact a solid surface, they take 1d4 bludgeoning for every 10 ft you traveled in a straight line before crashing into them. On a successful save they take half as much damage and are not pushed or knocked prone.

You gain a {{speed}} ft. flying speed. When you take the dash action you can move a extra three times your flying speed instead of one. of while flying you do not provoke opportunity attacks and can move in a straight line to crash through creatures. All creatures in your path must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take {{ce:modifier}}d8 bludgeoning damage and are pushed back 30 ft away from you and knocked prone. If they impact a solid surface, they take 1d4 bludgeoning for every 10 ft you traveled in a straight line before crashing into them. On a successful save they take half as much damage and are not pushed or knocked prone.

description.p: At 11th level, your hair has become almost indestructible, allowing you to grow it to longer lengths and activate your techniques more freely. The melee reach of your techniques increases by 5 ft and your hair counts as a Grade 1 Cursed Tool. At 18th level, your hair counts as a Special Grade Cursed Tool.

Once per turn you can spend 2 additional CE to activate one of your technique features requiring an attack roll as a bonus action. An attack roll made using this special free action is made at advantage. Alternatively, once per turn you can spend 4 CE to activate one of your technique features requiring a saving throw as a bonus action. A saving throw forced by this special free action is made at disadvantage.

sheet.description: The melee reach of your techniques increases by 5 ft and your hair counts as a Grade 1 Cursed Tool. Once per turn you can spend 2 additional CE to activate one of your technique features requiring an attack roll as a bonus action. An attack roll made using this is made at advantage. Alternatively, once per turn you can spend 4 CE to activate one of your technique features requiring a saving throw as a bonus action. A saving throw forced by this special free action is made at disadvantage.

The melee reach of your techniques increases by 5 ft and your hair counts as a Special Grade Cursed Tool. Once per turn you can spend 2 additional CE to activate one of your technique features requiring an attack roll as a bonus action. An attack roll made using this is made at advantage. Alternatively, once per turn you can spend 4 CE to activate one of your technique features requiring a saving throw as a bonus action. A saving throw forced by this special free action is made at disadvantage.

element.name: Domain Expansion: Silken Strand Execution Ground

description.p: Finally at 18th level you have learned to expand your domain. Creatures other than you take 2d10 slashing damage for every 5 ft they move within your domain as infinitesimally small and sharp hairs cut into them with their every movement. Your domain counts as difficult terrain for creatures other than you.

sheet.description: Creatures other than you take 2d10 slashing damage for every 5 ft they move. Your domain counts as difficult terrain for creatures other than you.

element.name: Domain Expansion: Silken Strand Execution Ground Replacement
